def negative_flask_file_read_per_request():
    rule_id = "flask_file_read_per_request"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flask views read files directly on request paths instead of using cached or static responses."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
